name: wan-huiyan-dbt-model-planner
description: Single-plugin marketplace for dbt-model-planner — Full lifecycle dbt model planner: requirements → source mapping → planning spreadsheet with human review → schema validation → SQL model creation → verification. Multi-dialect support (Spark, Snowflake, BigQuery, Postgres).
